steps: To purify GST-WIPI1/GST-WIPI2/GST-WIPI3/GST-WIPI4, we express the GST-tagged WIPI1/2d/3/4 from a pCAG backbone encoding GST-TEV-WIPI1/2/3/4 (available from Addgene).
Store the proteins at -80 °C .
Wash the beads twice with wash buffer, once with high salt wash buffer, and two more times with wash buffer. Wash buffer: %s %s Salt wash buffer: %s %s
Collect and incubate the supernatant with pre-equilibrated Glutathione Sepharose 4B beads (GE Healthcare) for 02:00:00 at 4 °C with gentle shaking to bind GST-TEV-WIPI1/2/3/4.
Clear the cell lysates by centrifugation at 10000 rpm, 4 °C, 45 minutes with a SORVAL RC6+ centrifuge with an F21S-8x50Y rotor (Thermo Scientific).
Sonicate the cell lysates twice for 00:00:30 .
For purification of GST-TEV-WIPI1/2/3/4, resuspend the cell pellet in, (complete EDTA-free protease inhibitors (Roche), CIP protease inhibitor (Sigma), and DNase (Sigma)). 25ml lysis buffer: %s %s
Store the pellets at -80 °C .
Wash the pellet with PBS to remove medium and then flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen.
Another 24:00:00 later, harvest the cells by centrifugation at 270 x g, °C, 20 minutes .
One day post transfection, supplement the culture with 100 mL EXCELL R 293 Serum-Free Medium (Sigma-Aldrich, 14571C- 1000ML).

On the day of transfection, transfect a 400 mL culture with 400 ug of the MAXI-prep DNA, diluted in 13 mL of Opti-MEMR I Reduced Serum Medium (Thermo, 31985-062), and 800 ug Polyethylenimine (PEI 25K, Polysciences CatNo 23966-1), also diluted in 13 mL of Opti-MEM media.
The day before transfection, seed the cells at a density of 0.7 x 10 ∧ 6 cells per ml.
Express the protein in FreeStyleTM HEK293F cells, grown at 37 °C in FreeStyle™ 293 Expression Medium (Thermo, 12338-026).
Centrifuge the samples to pellet the beads and remove the unbound lysate.
After concentrating the purified protein, aliquot the protein and snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen.
Incubate the beads Overnight with 4 mL of 50 millimolar (mM) reduced glutathione dissolved in wash buffer at 4 °C , to elute GST-tagged WIPI1/2/3/4 from the beads. Wash buffer: %s %s
Pool the fractions containing purified GST-TEV-WIPI1/2/3/4.
Analyse the fractions by SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining.
To collect the supernatant, collect the beads by centrifugation.
Elute the proteins with SEC buffer. SEC buffer: %s %s

Pool and filterate the supernatant fractions through a 0.45 µm syringe filter, concentrate with 30 kDa cut-off Amicon filter (Merck Millipore), and load onto a pre-equilibrated Superdex 200 Increase 10/300 GL column (Cytiva).
Wash the beads twice with 4 mL of wash buffer, and collect the supernatant.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
